name: autoflowview
description: Visualize TestNG test flows from @Test dependsOnMethods and @Parameters

commands.title: Show TestNG Flow for Active Editor

autoflowview.syncPreviewWithActiveEditor.markdownDescription: When enabled, the TestNG Flow preview reloads when you **switch to** a `.java` editor or **save** the active file (debounced). Turn off to avoid background work or focus on manually invoked previews only.

autoflowview.colors.preset.markdownDescription: Built-in palette for flow cards, badges, and banners. Ignored for keys you override when **Use custom flow colors** is on.

autoflowview.colors.useCustom.markdownDescription: When enabled, non-empty entries in **Custom flow colors** override the selected preset for those elements.

autoflowview.colors.custom.markdownDescription: Per-element hex colors (`#rgb` or `#rrggbb`) that override the preset when **Use custom flow colors** is on. Keys: `primaryStepBackground`, `primaryStepBorder`, `primaryStepForeground`, `externalStepBackground`, `externalStepBorder`, `externalStepForeground`, `declaringClassForeground`, `paramBadgeBackground`, `paramBadgeForeground`, `paramBadgeBorder`, `parallelBannerBackground`, `parallelBannerForeground`, `parallelBannerBorder`, `warningBackground`, `warningForeground`, `warningBorder`, `keysLabelForeground`, `superCallBackground`, `superCallForeground`, `superCallBorder`.
